title: Reholttumia kerintjiensis
taxonomy: Reholttumia kerintjiensis is a plant species classified in the family Gesneriaceae. The family Gesneriaceae is part of the order Lamiales in the angiosperm clade. This order is a part of the larger group of flowering plants known as eudicots. Reholttumia kerintjiensis is a type of flowering plant, specifically belonging to the division Magnoliophyta. Further classification details may be available in botanical databases or scientific literature.
